_comment: Focus profiles — a soft lens over the tool registry, not a gate. Selecting a focus boosts in-focus tools (by category and/or server id) in search + cast ranking; out-of-focus tools stay reachable. Select via env CH1TTY_FOCUS=<name> or the per-call `focus` param on ch1tty/search and ch1tty/cast. Server ids and categories reference servers.json — profiles may name disabled/future servers (they simply won't match until present).

finance.description: Billing, payments, and financial ecosystem tools

governance.description: ChittyOS ecosystem governance, identity, evidence, and persistent state

design.description: Browser rendering, automation, and desktop/visual work
